caption_style: WAYS creator captions; zero non-caption text

shots.voiceover: An archerfish can shoot insects out of the air.
shots.caption: An archerfish can shoot insects out of the air
shots.visual: clear fish at water surface aiming at insect above, instant water-jet hook

shots.voiceover: It makes a tiny water cannon with its mouth.
shots.caption: a tiny water cannon
shots.visual: close fish mouth at surface forming a narrow upward water jet

shots.voiceover: The jet gets stronger as the front catches up with the back.
shots.caption: the jet gets stronger
shots.visual: simple no-text slow-motion water stream thickening toward the target

shots.voiceover: Then the insect falls, and the fish grabs it.
shots.caption: the insect falls
shots.visual: insect knocked from leaf/branch toward water with fish below

shots.voiceover: So this little fish hunts by doing physics.
shots.caption: it hunts with physics
shots.visual: final full-frame fish surfacing with splash/ripples, family-friendly wonder
